style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. Three rounded boxes in a row, left to right, joined by curved arrows. The first box, drawn with a rust outline to emphasise it, is labelled PRONGHORN with a smaller word DESIGN beneath. The second box is labelled NEXUS with BUILD beneath. The third box is labelled VELOCITY with MEASURE beneath. A small caption under the row reads THREE STAGES, ONE ASSEMBLY LINE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. Three rounded boxes in a row, left to right, joined by curved arrows. The first box, drawn with a rust outline to emphasise it, is labelled PRONGHORN with a smaller word DESIGN beneath. The second box is labelled NEXUS with BUILD beneath. The third box is labelled VELOCITY with MEASURE beneath. A small caption under the row reads THREE STAGES, ONE ASSEMBLY LINE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
